rationale: Acting on Review 1 removes the dead-code AlgPoints def (confirmably unused in the diff) and trims the import to the minimal Basic file actually needed for IsAlgClosed (both direct, material placement fixes that any maintainer would accept). Acting on Review 2 instead forces an un-evidenced multi-file directory split and layer movement based on a roadmap absent from the diff, producing needless extra structure with no grounding in the shown changes.
